entries.title: Neon Reliquary
entries.description: Sacred geometry meets synthwave — a glowing devotional object for the networked age.

selections.SUBJECT: concept
selections.foundation: a luminous reliquary of impossible geometry, suspended in a void of neon haze

entries.title: Tidal Memory
entries.description: Soft atmospheric seascape painted in the language of remembrance.

selections.SUBJECT: nature
selections.foundation: a fading shoreline at dusk, waves dissolving into mist and half-remembered light

entries.title: Agora Static
entries.description: A protest poster cut from the noise of the public square.

selections.SUBJECT: society
selections.foundation: bold interference patterns and torn typography colliding across a city wall

entries.title: Bone Orchard
entries.description: Carved organic forms with the weight of prehistoric ritual.

selections.SUBJECT: figure
selections.foundation: weathered figures emerging from ancient bone and root, gathered in a silent grove

entries.title: Threadbare Archive
entries.description: Stitched textile documentary — domestic histories recorded in cloth.

selections.SUBJECT: narrative
selections.foundation: an embroidered tapestry of everyday rituals, threads fraying into unfinished stories

entries.title: Chiaroscuro Engine
entries.description: Dramatic light and shadow projected onto an institutional machine dream.

selections.SUBJECT: object
selections.foundation: a vast mechanical heart projected in stark light and shadow across a museum atrium
